changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Add Dark Room Imaging page (Page 6) to existing Virology notebook instances that don't have it
changeSet.sql: -- Insert Dark Room Imaging page for each Virology notebook that doesn't have page 6 INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page ( id, title, instructions, content, page_order, completed, page_type, notebook_id, last_updated ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), 'Dark Room Imaging', 'Perform imaging or fluorescence analysis on virus culture samples. Store image data (Image ID), record CPE (Cytopathic Effect) observations, measure fluorescence intensity, and document any relevant observations.', 'Dark Room Imaging - Capture image data and fluorescence analysis results', 6, false, 'BULK_DATA_ENTRY', n.id, now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title LIKE '%Virology%' AND n.is_template = false AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 6 );

rollback.sql: -- Remove Dark Room Imaging pages added by this changeset DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE title = 'Dark Room Imaging' AND page_order = 6 AND notebook_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Virology%' AND is_template = false );
